'''Varnillian''' was an [[Imperial weapons technician]] who held the [[Assignment|position]] of [[Chief gunnery officer|Gunnery Chief]] within the [[Imperial Military|armed forces]] of the [[Galactic Empire]]. At one point during her career, Varnillian served in a control room. The [[human]] had [[Color|blonde]] [[hair]], gray [[eye]]s, and light skin,<ref name="The Siege Breaker" /> and wore an Imperial [[gunner]]'s [[Imperial military uniforms|uniform]] consisting of a black [[Clothing|tunic]] over a black long-sleeved shirt, a black [[belt]] with a silver [[officer's disk]] on its buckle, and black [[glove]]s.<ref name="Tiziano Baracchi portfolio">{{Facebook|username=tiziano.baracchi|url=tiziano.baracchi/posts/10223396531211150|name=Tiziano Baracchi|date=2020-11-28|archiveurl=https://archive.is/icO45}} ([https://www.facebook.com/media/set/?vanity=tiziano.baracchi&set=a.10223396530731138 full gallery])</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In the current ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]], Varnillian was created for<ref name="The Siege Breaker" /> the [[2020]]<ref name="Available Now January 31">{{FFGweb|url=en/news/2020/1/31/available-now-january-24-1|text=Available Now – January 31}}</ref> [[Onager-class Star Destroyer Expansion Pack|Onager''-class Star Destroyer Expansion Pack'']] of [[Fantasy Flight Games]]' [[Star Wars: Armada|''Star Wars'': Armada]] tactical miniatures game. Prior to the expansion's release, Varnillian was mentioned in "[https://www.fantasyflightgames.com/en/news/2019/11/25/the-siege-breaker The Siege Breaker]," a promotional article published on the Fantasy Flight Games website on [[November 25]], [[2019]].<ref name="The Siege Breaker" /> [[Tiziano Baracchi]], who provided an illustration of Varnillian for the expansion, used the name "Niclara Varnillian" in an art showcase.<ref name="Tiziano Baracchi portfolio" />

[[Niclara Varnillian]] was originally introduced in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, appearing in the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the [[November]] [[1995]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|eighth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine. The segment was written by [[Craig Robert Carey]] and illustrated by [[Robert Duchlinski]].<ref name="Star Wars Adventure Journal 8">{{Journal|8|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}}</ref>
